title: Bitola, Pelagonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bitola, Pelagonia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bitola is a city in Pelagonia with a population of 74,000. A historic city in southern North Macedonia near the Greek border, known for its neoclassical architecture, the ancient city of Heraclea Lyncestis, and Pelister National Park.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
